raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "declaring a personal commitment to a specific approach to self-improvement",
  "implicit_claims": [
    "vague resolutions are inherently unachievable",
    "small observable changes are reliably executable",
    "the speaker can accurately distinguish executable changes from vague ones",
    "this shift in approach represents a meaningful improvement over prior behavior"
  ],
  "coherence_assessment": "internally coherent; clearly contrasts two resolution styles and endorses the practical alternative without contradiction",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "the speaker must subsequently identify, track, and execute concrete changes whose cumulative effect produces desired outcomes",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "the statement functions only as aspirational rhetoric without follow-through, or the 'small changes' remain undefined or unmeasured"
}
